input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON, but those formats require optional Hoplite modules; for hoplite-core coverage, generated tests should prefer MapPropertySource, built-in .properties/.props support, or direct core APIs unless intentionally testing an optional format module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core can be meaningfully exercised with its normal test scaffold: the resolved artifact brings its required Kotlin/coroutines dependencies transitively, and core usage works through MapPropertySource, built-in Java properties parsing, decoders, property sources, and loader APIs without Docker or extra runtime services.
